title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 28 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 28/11/2023
Image reference: 2023-11-28_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-28-2023_img1.png
Bulkers: Mid-age Capesize values decrease owing to sale of Genco Commodus
Capesize BC Genco Commodus (169,100 DWT, Jul 2009, Sungdong) sold to unknown Asian buyers for 19.5 USD mil VV Value USD 20.6 mil
Panamax BC Nord Beluga (81,400 DWT, Apr 2015, Oshima) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 27.0 mil, VV Value USD 26.87 mil
Supramax BC Bulk Honduras (58,000 DWT, May 2012, Tsuneishi Cebu) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 19.50 mil, VV Value USD 17.5 mil
Handy BC Yangtze Pioneer (32,600 DWT, Jan 2011, Jiangmeng) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 10.9 mil, VV Value USD 10.0 mil
Tankers: Values remained stable last week
Aframax Aegean Myth (115,800 DWT, Aug 2006, Samsung) sold to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 37.50 mil, VV Value USD 36.17 mil
MR2 (Chem/Product) Ocios Ioannis (47,100 DWT, Aug 2009, Hyundai Mipo) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 25 mil, VV Value USD 25.49 mil
MR2 (Chem/Product) Vasso (46,200 DWT, Nov 2006, STX Offshore) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 19.25 mil, VV Value USD 19.85 mil
Containers: 15YO secondhand values decreas
